articles.title: Sign-ups for the Campinas Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Campinas Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Latin America, held on 16–17 May 2026!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Prague Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Prague Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Europe, held on 25–26 April 2026!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Melbourne Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Melbourne Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Oceania, held on 23–24 May 2026!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Turin SC are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Turin Special Championships, the first major event in Europe to be played with Pokémon Champions, held on 6–7 June 2026!

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from the 2026 Querétaro Regional Championships!
articles.snippet: 2026 Monterrey Regional finalist Alexander Canseco has won his first major title! Alexander defeated fellow Mexican player Otoniel Longorio in the finals of the Querétaro Regional Championships.

articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
articles.snippet: A special expansion featuring Terastal Pokemon coming January 2025.
